spacing_and_layout.general: Generous padding, optical alignment over geometrical, mobile-first.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD400] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-yellow-500 transition-colors px-8 py-4 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#1E22A8] text-[#1E22A8] font-semibold hover:bg-[#1E22A8] hover:text-white transition-colors px-8 py-4 rounded-none

cards.service_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 p-8 rounded-none hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#1E22A8] transition-all duration-300
cards.step_card: flex flex-col gap-4 border-l-2 border-slate-200 pl-6 py-2 relative

components_strategy.inputs: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 rounded-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1E22A8] focus:border-transparent transition-all
components_strategy.navigation: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200

sections.name: Header
sections.description: Sticky crystal glass nav. Logo on left. Navigation links center. 'Request Repair' button on right (Yellow).

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Split 50/50. Left: Overline 'EXPERT REPAIR SERVICES', H1 'We fix Computers, Mobiles & Tablets.', Subtitle 'Fast, reliable, and affordable mail-in repairs from Burnley to the whole UK.', CTAs. Right: High-quality image of hands working on a device, with a subtle 1px border and a floating badge 'Best Price Guarantee'.

sections.name: Brands Marquee
sections.description: Editorial ribbon style. Very slow horizontal scroll of supported brands: Apple, Samsung, Huawei, Windows. Grayscale text, large spacing (gap-24).

sections.name: Services Showcase
sections.layout: Bento Grid. H2: 'Expert Repairs for Every Device'. Cards for Mobile Repairs & Unlocking (col-span-12 md:col-span-6), PC/Laptop Repairs (col-span-12 md:col-span-3), Data Recovery (col-span-12 md:col-span-3). Dense technical feel.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.layout: 4-column grid on desktop. Large numbers '01, 02, 03, 04' in #1E22A8. Steps: 1. Send details & photos, 2. Get quote & pay, 3. We repair it, 4. Posted back to you. Use crisp vertical lines connecting them.

sections.name: Trust / Why Us
sections.layout: Full width dark section. bg-[#1E22A8] text-white. 4-column metrics grid: 8+ Years Experience, Best Price Guarantee, Trusted Local Shop, Free 24/7 Support. Accents in #FFD400.

sections.name: Mail-In Form
sections.layout: Centered container. H2 'Request a Repair'. Cardless form directly on a slate-50 background. Fields: Name, Contact, Device Model, Issue Description, Photo Upload (File input area with dashed border). Full width Yellow submit button.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: Massive padding py-24. Dark bg-slate-950. Big brand text 'EURO MOBILE & COMPUTER'. Contact details: Burnley, Lancashire. Legal links.

hero_image.alt: Close up of hands repairing a smartphone

icons.usage: Use Smartphone, Laptop, HardDrive for services. Use Shield, Clock, ThumbsUp, Wrench for Trust section.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons have crisp background color swaps (no slow fades). Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and borders turn #1E22A8.
motion_and_interaction.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion for simple staggered fade-up on sections as they scroll into view.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on #1E22A8 meets AA standards. Ensure black text on #FFD400 meets AA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All forms, inputs, buttons, and links MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'hero-cta-button', 'repair-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. DO NOT use custom CSS files unless absolutely necessary.
Implement the 'Outfit' font for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Update index.html or layout.jsx to import these from Google Fonts.
Follow the exact color hex codes provided in the brand_colors section to respect the client's strict brand guidelines.
Keep borders sharp (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to match the tech-oriented, clean Swiss archetype.
Use Shadcn UI components for the form inputs, but strip away any default 'Vercel' rounded corners to match the sharp design language.
